query_normalized: predicting polymer degradation pathways with graph neural networks chemistry
rationale: This paper is off-domain entirely: it proposes a polynomial chaos-based neural network architecture without any connection to graph neural networks (GNNs), polymer chemistry, or degradation pathways. It fails all acceptance criteria (a-f) as it addresses neither the method (GNNs vs. polynomial chaos NNs are distinct architectures) nor the domain (chemistry/polymer degradation) of the user's question.
